title: DefenseClaw Audit Event
description: Row persisted in audit_events (SQLite) and forwarded to Splunk/HTTP sinks. v7 adds provenance (SchemaVersion=7) + three-tier agent identity. Consumers MUST treat every field marked optional as nullable — not every action emits every field.

action.description: Curated action — see internal/audit/actions.go (Go) and cli/defenseclaw/audit_actions.py (Python). Extending this enum is a minor schema bump.

target.description: Target of the action (skill id, mcp server id, policy id, etc). Nullable — lifecycle events like 'init' and 'ready' have no target.

details.description: Redacted free-form detail blob. JSON-encoded payload after sanitizer. Treat as opaque.

agent_id.description: Stable agent identity across process restarts.

agent_instance_id.description: Per-session agent identity — rotates on new session.

sidecar_instance_id.description: Per-process sidecar identity — rotates on every defenseclaw gateway start.

schema_version.description: Audit row format version. v7 = provenance + three-tier agent identity. Downstream MUST reject unrecognized versions.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical JSON serialization of the emitting config / policy at emit time. Optional; present when the event describes a configurable surface.

generation.description: Monotonic counter incremented on every Save of the governing config/policy. Optional.

binary_version.description: Semver of the DefenseClaw binary that produced the event.
